boxDescription: The fuse box is located at the front left of the engine compartment. Unlatch the cover, lift it, and remove it. Note: The vehicle may not be equipped with all the fuses, relays, and functions shown.

boxDescription: The fuse box is behind the instrument panel cover. Remove the instrument panel cover in the direction of the arrow. Reassemble the cover in reverse order. Note: The vehicle may not be equipped with all the fuses, relays, and functions shown.
